title: Add Arika to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Arika](https://arika.hizumi.in) to chat
- Arika provides a conversational AI experience designed to feel more human and less robotic.

Fixes #10161

gist.headline: A warmer chat flower
gist.blurb: Arika joined the greenhouse: a conversational AI built to sound a little less like a vending machine. Polli has brought a tiny scarf for the occasion.
gist.summary: Added Arika, a conversational AI experience designed to feel more human and less robotic, to the community app listings in README.md, apps/APPS.md, and apps/GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: People browsing Pollinations community projects can now discover Arika as another place to have warmer, more natural-feeling AI conversations.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Arika as a cozy, friendly chat companion represented by a softly glowing retro terminal with warm speech bubbles, growing in the Pollinations app greenhouse. Polli, wearing a tiny scarf, tends a flowering code-plant beside it, showing that a new conversational project has joined the community garden.
gist.image_prompt: A cozy greenhouse scene where the main character is a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings; she wears a tiny scarf while watering a flowering code-plant beside a friendly retro chat terminal glowing with warm speech bubbles labeled “ARIKA.” Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint-lavender-peach gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, subtle CRT glow, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
